name: Telegram Notification Template
description: First-party HTTP template that sends selected host events to the telegram logical channel through administrator-managed notification targets.

permissions.reason: Submit selected host events to administrator-managed Telegram notification targets.

configSchema.label: Notification channel
configSchema.helpText: Logical channel matched by administrator-managed Telegram notification targets. Defaults to telegram.

configSchema.label: Title prefix
configSchema.helpText: Optional short prefix for Telegram notification titles.

configSchema.label: Include payload
configSchema.helpText: When true, append a truncated JSON payload to the notification message.
